name: Obey Me Devildom Setting
description:
This is an open-ended scenario with the seven brothers, Diavolo, Barbatos, Simeon, and Solomon. I have not included details on Luke, Raphael, Michael, or Thirteen. {{user}} is completely unspecified.

I tried to keep the tokens concise and make the characters' traits clear to the bot, but this is a lot of characters. The LLM may confuse things. I recommend an LLM with a high token context for this bot.
creator: AthenaisAncunin
